get.description: List notification preferences for the authenticated user.

post.description: Save notification preferences for the authenticated user.

get.description: List notifications for the authenticated user.

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

put.description: Mark the specified notifications as read.
Mark the specified notification as read.
Disconnect my connection from a third-party platform.

parameters.description: The registration ID of the third-party platform.
parameters.name: registerId

get.description: List posts owned by the current user with pagination, sorting, keyword, publish phase, and category filters.

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Filter posts by publish phase. Supported values follow PostPhase, such as DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, PUBLISHED, or FAILED.
parameters.name: publishPhase

parameters.description: Keyword used to match post title, slug, or excerpt.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Category metadata name used to include posts in that category and its child categories.
parameters.name: categoryWithChildren

post.description: Create a draft post for the current user. To create it with initial content, put JSON-serialized Content into metadata.annotations['content.halo.run/content-json'].

requestBody.description: Post extension to create. The server assigns spec.owner from the current user and consumes the content-json annotation as initial content when present.

get.description: Get a post owned by the current user by metadata.name.

parameters.description: metadata.name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

put.description: Update post metadata and editable spec fields for the current user. Content is not updated by this operation.

parameters.description: metadata.name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

requestBody.description: Post extension with updated metadata/spec values. The server preserves owner, publish, snapshot, and deleted state fields, and ignores the content-json annotation here.

get.description: Get the editable draft snapshot of a post owned by the current user.

parameters.description: metadata.name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Whether to return the head snapshot patched against the base snapshot. Defaults to false.
parameters.name: patched

put.description: Update the editable draft snapshot of a post owned by the current user. The snapshot must belong to the post and must be the current head snapshot.

parameters.description: metadata.name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

requestBody.description: Snapshot payload carrying JSON-serialized Content in metadata.annotations['content.halo.run/content-json'].

put.description: Publish a post owned by the current user from its current head snapshot.

parameters.description: metadata.name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

delete.description: Move a post owned by the current user to the recycle bin.

parameters.description: metadata.name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

put.description: Unpublish a post owned by the current user so it is no longer served as published content.

parameters.description: metadata.name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

get.description: Get a content snapshot for a post owned by the current user. The snapshot must belong to the post specified by postName.

parameters.description: metadata.name of the snapshot to fetch.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: metadata.name of the post that owns the snapshot. The post must belong to the current user.
parameters.name: postName

parameters.description: Whether to return the snapshot patched against the post base snapshot. Defaults to false.
parameters.name: patched

get.description: List available AnnotationSettings for the given targetRef. The available AnnotationSettings are determined by the currently activated theme and started plugins.

parameters.description: The targetRef of the AnnotationSetting. e.g.: 'content.halo.run/Post
parameters.name: targetRef

put.description: Create or update my preference by group.

delete.description: Delete the current user's configured TOTP authenticator after password verification.

get.description: Get TOTP auth link, including secret

parameters.description: metadata.name of the PAT to delete.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: metadata.name of the PAT to fetch.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: metadata.name of the PAT to restore.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: metadata.name of the PAT to revoke.
parameters.name: name

get.description: List attachments of the current user uploaded.

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Filter attachments without group. This parameter will ignore group parameter.
parameters.name: ungrouped

post.description: Create attachment for the given post. Deprecated in favor of /attachments/-/upload.
Upload attachment to user center storage.

Upload attachment from the given URL.
Deprecated in favor of /attachments/-/upload.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

value.description: Value can be any JSON value

AnnotationSetting.description: Annotation setting extension that defines dynamic annotation forms for a target extension kind.

formSchema.description: FormKit-compatible schema used to render annotation fields.

AnnotationSettingSpec.description: Desired annotation form configuration for a target resource kind.

Attachment.description: Attachment extension that describes an uploaded file and its resolved access URLs.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

displayName.description: Display name shown for the attachment.

groupName.description: Attachment group metadata.name this attachment belongs to.

mediaType.description: Media type detected or supplied for the attachment, such as image/png.

policyName.description: Storage policy metadata.name used to store this attachment.

size.description: Size of the attachment in bytes.

tags.description: Free-form tags assigned to the attachment.

AttachmentSpec.description: Desired attachment metadata and storage placement.

permalink.description:
Public permalink for the attachment. Local storage usually exposes a public URL, while object storage may
 expose the object URL.

thumbnails.description: Generated thumbnail URLs keyed by thumbnail size name.

Category.description: Category extension for grouping posts and building category archives.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the category.

hideFromList.description:
Hides this root category tree and its posts from theme-side lists. Permalinks remain accessible, and only
 root categories are expected to set this flag.

postTemplate.description: Theme template used for posts in this category when the post does not specify its own spec.template.

preventParentPostCascadeQuery.description:
Stops parent category post queries from cascading into this category tree. Direct post queries for this
 category are unaffected.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Higher values sort before lower values where priority ordering is applied.

slug.description: URL slug used to build the category permalink.

template.description: Theme template used to render the category archive page.

CategorySpec.description: Desired category display, hierarchy, and rendering configuration.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the category permalink policy.

postCount.description: Total number of posts in this category and all descendant categories.

visiblePostCount.description: Total number of published and public posts in this category and all descendant categories.

CategoryStatus.description: Observed category state derived by content reconcilers.

lastTransitionTime.description: Last time the condition transitioned from one status to another.

message.description: Human-readable message indicating details about last transition. This may be an empty string.

reason.description: Unique, one-word, CamelCase reason for the condition's last transition.

status.description: Status is the status of the condition. Can be True, False, Unknown.

type.description: type of condition in CamelCase or in foo.example.com/CamelCase. example: Ready, Initialized. maxLength: 316.

Condition.description: EqualsAndHashCode 排除了lastTransitionTime否则失败时，lastTransitionTime 会被更新 导致 equals 为 false，一直被加入队列.

Contributor.description: User summary for a content owner or contributor.

from.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

Device.description: Device extension that records an authenticated browser session for account security visibility.

ipAddress.description: Client IP address observed for the session.

lastAccessedTime.description: Last time this session accessed Halo.

lastAuthenticatedTime.description: Last time the user authenticated for this session.

principalName.description: Principal name of the authenticated user.

rememberMeSeriesId.description: Remember-me series id associated with the session, if any.

sessionId.description: Web session identifier associated with the device.

userAgent.description: Client user-agent header captured for the session.

DeviceSpec.description: Session identity and request metadata captured for a device.

browser.description: Browser name parsed from the user agent.

os.description: Operating system name parsed from the user agent.

DeviceStatus.description: Parsed browser and operating system details for display.

autoGenerate.description: Whether Halo should generate the excerpt from the released content automatically.

raw.description: Manual excerpt text used when autoGenerate is false.

Excerpt.description: Excerpt generation configuration for a post or single page.

GroupKind.description: GroupKind contains group and kind data only.

categories.description: Resolved categories referenced by the post spec.

contributors.description: Users that have contributed to the post content snapshots.

tags.description: Resolved tags referenced by the post spec.

ListedPost.description: Post list item with resolved categories, tags, contributors, owner, and counters.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

MarkSpecifiedRequest.description: Payload for marking multiple notifications as read.

generateName.description: The name field will be generated automatically according to the given generateName field

version.description: Current version of the Extension. It will be bumped up every update.

from.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

lastReadAt.description: Last time the recipient marked this notification as read.

rawContent.description: Plain text or source notification content.

reason.description: Reason metadata.name that generated this notification.

recipient.description: User metadata.name that receives the notification.

title.description: Notification title shown in the notification center.

unread.description: Whether the recipient has not read the notification yet.

NotificationSpec.description: Notification content and read state for one recipient.

NotifierInfo.description: Notifier metadata used by notification preference UI.

password.description: Current password of the authenticated user.

totpCode.description: Current TOTP code, required when TOTP has already been configured.

PasswordRequest.description: Password verification payload for changing two-factor authentication settings.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of how the token is used.

expiresAt.description: Time when the token expires. A null value means the token does not expire by time.

lastUsed.description: Last time the token was used successfully.

name.description: Display name chosen by the token owner.

revoked.description: Whether the token has been manually revoked.

revokesAt.description: Time when the token was revoked.

roles.description: Role names granted to this token.

scopes.description: Scope strings granted to this token.

tokenId.description: Stable token identifier stored separately from the secret token value.

username.description: User metadata.name that owns this token.

PatSpec.description: Desired personal access token settings and lifecycle flags.

PersonalAccessToken.description: Personal access token extension used for non-interactive API authentication on behalf of a Halo user.

Post.description: Post extension that stores article metadata, publication settings, taxonomy, and derived status.

allowComment.description: Whether new comments are allowed for this post.

baseSnapshot.description: Base Snapshot metadata.name used to reconstruct raw and rendered content from patches.

categories.description: Category metadata.name values associated with the post.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the post.

deleted.description: Whether the post is logically deleted and should be treated as recycled.

headSnapshot.description: Snapshot metadata.name containing the latest editable draft content.

htmlMetas.description: HTML meta tag attribute maps injected into the rendered post page head.

owner.description: User metadata.name of the post owner.

pinned.description: Whether the post should be pinned ahead of normal post ordering.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Higher values sort before lower values where priority ordering is applied.

publish.description: Desired publish state. False keeps the post as a draft or moves it back to draft.

publishTime.description: Time when the post was published or is scheduled to be published.

releaseSnapshot.description: Snapshot metadata.name selected as the published content version.

slug.description: URL slug used to build the post permalink.

tags.description: Tag metadata.name values associated with the post.

template.description: Theme template used to render this post.

visible.description: Visibility used by theme-side and public REST queries; anonymous clients only receive PUBLIC posts.

PostSpec.description: Desired post content, publication, taxonomy, and rendering configuration.

commentsCount.description: Total number of comments associated with the content item.

conditions.description: Reconciliation conditions reported by controllers for this content item.

contributors.description: User metadata.name values that contributed to the content snapshots.

excerpt.description: Excerpt text resolved from the content excerpt configuration.

hideFromList.description: Whether any associated category hides this content item from theme-side lists.

inProgress.description: Whether the latest draft snapshot differs from the released snapshot.

lastModifyTime.description: Last modification time of the released snapshot.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the content permalink policy.

phase.description: Current publishing phase, such as DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, PUBLISHED, or FAILED.

PostStatus.description: Observed post state derived by content reconcilers.

ReasonTypeInfo.description: Reason type metadata used by notification preference UI.

ReasonTypeNotifierCollectionRequest.description: Payload for saving notifier selections by reason type.

notifiers.description: Notification notifiers available to the user.

reasonTypes.description: Reason types available to the user.

stateMatrix.description: Enabled-state matrix indexed by reason type and notifier.

ReasonTypeNotifierMatrix.description: Matrix describing which notifiers are enabled for each reason type.

ReasonTypeNotifierRequest.description: Notifier selection for one reason type.

name.description: Extension name. This field is mandatory

Ref.description: Extension reference object. The name is mandatory

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.
A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

value.description: Value can be any JSON value

contentPatch.description: Full rendered content for a base snapshot, or a JSON-encoded line diff from the base rendered content.

contributors.description: User metadata.name values that contributed to this snapshot.

lastModifyTime.description: Last time the snapshot content was modified.

owner.description: User metadata.name of the snapshot owner.

parentSnapshotName.description: Parent Snapshot metadata.name in the snapshot revision chain.

rawPatch.description: Full raw source content for a base snapshot, or a JSON-encoded line diff from the base raw content.

rawType.description: Source format of the raw content, such as markdown, html, json, asciidoc, or latex.

Snapshot.description: Snapshot extension that stores a version of post or single page content.

totalComment.description: Total comment count, including comments that may not be approved.

Stats.description: Aggregated visit, upvote, and comment counters for a content resource.

Tag.description: Tag extension for grouping posts by free-form labels.

color.description: Display color of the tag in 3- or 6-digit hex notation, such as #fff or #ffffff.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the tag.

slug.description: URL slug used to build the tag permalink.

TagSpec.description: Desired tag display and rendering configuration.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the tag permalink policy.

postCount.description: Total number of posts associated with the tag.

visiblePostCount.description: Total number of published and public posts associated with the tag.

TagStatus.description: Observed tag state derived by content reconcilers.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

value.description: Value can be any JSON value

authLink.description: otpauth URI that can be encoded as a QR code.

rawSecret.description: Raw TOTP secret for manual authenticator setup.

TotpAuthLinkResponse.description: TOTP provisioning data for configuring an authenticator app.

code.description: TOTP code generated from the new secret.

currentTotpCode.description: Current TOTP code, required when replacing an existing TOTP authenticator.

password.description: Current password of the authenticated user.

secret.description: Raw TOTP secret returned by the auth-link endpoint.

emailVerified.description: Whether the user's email address has been verified.

enabled.description: Whether two-factor authentication is enabled for the user.

totpConfigured.description: Whether a TOTP authenticator has been configured.

TwoFactorAuthSettings.description: Two-factor authentication settings for the current user.

UcUploadFromUrlRequest.description: User-center request payload for uploading from a URL.

file.description: The file to upload. If not provided, the url will be used.

filename.description: The filename to use when uploading from url. If not provided, the filename will be extracted from the url.

url.description: The url to upload from. If not provided, the file will be used.

UploadForm.description: Upload form from console. The file and url are mutually exclusive. If both are provided, the file will be used.

UserConnection.description: User connection extension that links a Halo user to an external OAuth2 account.

providerUserId.description: The unique identifier for the user's connection to the OAuth provider. for example, the user's GitHub id.

registrationId.description: The name of the OAuth provider (e.g. Google, Facebook, Twitter).

updatedAt.description: The time when the user connection was last updated.

username.description: The {@link Metadata#getName Metadata#getName()} of the user associated with the OAuth connection.

UserConnectionSpec.description: External OAuth2 account binding for a Halo user.

active.description: Whether the device session is still active.

currentDevice.description: Whether this device matches the current session.

UserDevice.description: User device entry with session state.
